message:
fix(combinator): make SelectAllDrain fail closed after terminal completion

Add SelectAllDrainError enum with PolledAfterCompletion variant so that
re-polling a completed SelectAllDrain returns a typed error instead of
panicking. Adds completed bool field and regression test verifying
upstream is not re-polled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
